problem id: f8fc43d2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11101010 -> 01101101
  10110110 -> 10011000
  11111111 -> 11000000
  01000111 -> 00101011
  10000000 -> 00100100
  11110111 -> 10000010
  01101111 -> 01100000
  10110101 -> 10000000

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11100100
